DAP candidate DUN Nilai (N.10 Tier-4). Confident of defending Nilai without BN (PH going solo). 5-cornered fight. Nilai = largest electorate (41,000+), ~14,200 under 30. PIR-07 N.10 Nilai entity per priority list.

entity: Senarai penuh 103 calon PRN NS 2026 (full candidate list)
context: Complete list of 103 candidates across 36 DUN seats. Reference data for cross-checking seat allocations: PH 36 solo / BN 25 / PN 11 / Bersatu 24 solo / Berjasa + independents. PIR-07 reference. Confirms youngest candidate 23, oldest 70. 0 nomination papers rejected.

entity: Six NS seats that tell the story (Malay Mail analysis)
context: Malay Mail analysis identifies 6 key seats: (1) Rantau — Tok Mat stronghold since 2004, 71.7% in 2023, PAS' Rozmal Malakan lost by 10,000+; (2) Chennah — Loke vs Siow Kong Choon (MCA), straight fight via BN-PN; (3) Linggi — Aminuddin (MB) vs Mohd Faizal (BN), Umno's oldest fortress since 1959; (4) Lenggeng — BN won by 685 votes 2023, ~75% Malay, PN could benefit; (5) Lukut — Choo Ken Hwa (DAP), ~79%, 7,000+ military early voters; (6) Nilai — 5-cornered, largest electorate 41,000+, ~14,200 under 30.

N.28 Klawang (T1) 3-cornered: Bakri Sawir (PH incumbent, Datuk) vs Danni Rais (PN) — COUSINS. Crossed paths at Kuala Klawang weekly market (Sunday). Cordial encounter — exchanged jokes, no provocation. 13,355 registered voters. Third candidate: Muhammad Adib Musa (Bersatu). EC: early voting 28 Jul, polling 1 Aug.

entity: Jalaluddin thanks PN for backing BN to lead NS
context: Jalaluddin Alias thanks PN for 'deklarasi awal' — PN leaves MB post to BN should alliance win. BN and PN have NOT discussed MB candidate or exco allocation — focus on winning first. 'Our goal is to win as many seats as possible first.' Names Tok Mat + Sufian Maradzi as potential MB. BN 25 seats, PN 11, no overlap. MB after PRN entity per PIR-16.
